phase66HygieneFixes: Updated the Phase 6.6 run-log commit/push status to committed and pushed as ffdfe8f ui: apply Figma cleanup before site dashboard.

siteSelectionBehavior.multipleAccessibleSites: platform_admin, legacy admin, and org_admin use documented Desert Valley demo default when accessible; otherwise selectionRequired with accessibleSites

sqlSiteScopingStrategy: Students are counted from active selected-site site_users joined to student role memberships.
Programs are counted from active selected-site site_programs.

Submissions, evidence, mentor assignments, presentation slots, exports, top-risk rows, and audit activity are filtered through selected-site student memberships when their tables do not carry site_id.
No global legacy admin dashboard counts are reused for /api/site/dashboard.
workspaceChanges: Added currentData.siteDashboard and loadWorkspaceData fetch for platform_admin, legacy admin, org_admin, site_admin, and viewer roles.
Added Site Dashboard navigation section with label Site Dashboard and detail School-wide capstone health.
Overview now renders the route-connected Site Dashboard for platform, organization, site-administration, legacy admin, and viewer roles.
Legacy admin users retain an Admin Command Center section backed by /api/admin/dashboard.
Site dashboard metric tiles do not navigate to student directory or student detail routes before Phase 8.

roleAccessMatrix.admin: legacy platform-equivalent compatibility can view any active site
roleAccessMatrix.org_admin: can view assigned tenant sites only
roleAccessMatrix.viewer: can view assigned site read-only with mutation permissions false
roleAccessMatrix.misc_admin: 403; aggregate readiness compatibility remains only in /api/reports/readiness

figmaPatternUsage: Site dashboard renders under the Phase 6.6 product header in renderAppShell.
Status rows and next actions use statusPill().
Selection, unavailable, and denied states use renderProblemState().
Rule cards expose Private evidence, Role scoped views, Audited changes, and Teacher intervention language.
Viewer mode uses the existing product-header read-only marker and workspace-read-only-banner.
localProofUpdates: scripts/prove-local-demo-workspace.mjs now proves /api/site/dashboard primary and secondary counts.
Local proof now verifies viewer dashboard read-only behavior and site_admin denial for another site.

validation.npm run test: passed; 284 passing tests and 4 expected local HTTP skips
validation.npm run check: passed; aggregate checks and test suite passed
validation.npm run prove:demo:local: passed; proved primary site 250 students, secondary site 60 students, viewer read-only, and site-admin cross-site denial
validation.git diff --check: passed with CRLF normalization warnings only

blockers: Remote D1 still lacks migration 0011_multisite_site_role_foundation.sql, so no remote proof or hosted proof was run.
Student directory and student detail remain Phase 8 and Phase 9 work.
